data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by limiting choices available to users.
data.technical_spec: Designed minimalistic and intuitive navigation menus.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes interactive elements for ease of access and usability.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas and strategic placement of CTAs.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related content together, enhancing user focus and comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes visual boundaries and spacing effectively.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Reduces cognitive load by keeping information clustered to seven or fewer items.
data.technical_spec: Uses concise product descriptions and clear content sections.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs patterns that align with user expectations from similar websites.
data.technical_spec: Consistent interface elements and layout similar to popular standards.
